scenario: MUTATION CONTROL — violates exactly one rule: built from valid-duplicate-minor-guardian-language-request with the single change that requestedFormLanguage is set to 'albanian'. Albanian is deliberately not one of this field's 5 enumerated values (turkish/aromanian/serbian/romani/bosnian) — Type A's own alternate-script checkbox row omits Albanian because the bilingual Macedonian/Albanian specimen (Образец бр. 2, "ТИП-Б", out of scope for this v1.0.0 per this schema's own VERIFICATION.md) is the dedicated pathway for that language instead. Every other field/document stays as in the valid scenario.
expectedViolation: requestedFormLanguage value 'albanian' is not one of validation.enum
